intent: Create a new skill, then set up a test harness for it, then optimize its triggers
scope_in: skill creation, test harness setup, trigger optimization
scope_out: implementation details of individual skills, code writing
success_criteria: 3 phases completed in order: skill created, test harness set up, triggers optimized — each validated before next
constraints: Each phase must pass validation before proceeding

multi_phase.phase_2: Set up a test harness for it
